prestazioni: Engine swap to a **SR20DET Red Top (Version 2, 220ps stock)** with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** (0.86 A/R turbine housing) paired with a **Tomei 260° camshaft set** and **JUN forged pistons (87mm, 8.5:1 CR)** for 350whp on **E85 fuel** with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** managing **ID1000 injectors** and a **Nismo 74mm throttle body**.

Full **Nismo 4.1:1 ratio 5-speed manual transmission** conversion with a **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** and **Nismo carbon fiber driveshaft** to handle increased torque, paired with **Nismo 550cc clutch master/slave cylinder kit** for precise engagement.

Custom **GReddy intercooler core (3.5" thick, 24"x12"x3.5")** with **HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve** and **SARD 76mm aluminum radiator** to maintain intake temps under 40°C at 1.5bar boost, supported by a **Nismo oil cooler (19 rows)** and **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Wingroad-specific)** with **custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap** and **Voltex Type-3 rear wing (carbon fiber, 1200mm span)** for aggressive stance and downforce, paired with **Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x9 +35 front, 17x10 +35 rear)** in **Gunmetal finish**.

**JDM-spec Nissan S15 Silvia front bumper conversion** with **Seibon carbon fiber hood (custom vented for intercooler clearance)** and **Nismo side skirts (Y10-specific)** to reduce drag coefficient to **0.32 Cd**, complemented by **PIAA 900 Series HID headlights** and **Depo JDM taillights**.

**Custom interior roll cage (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly)** by **Auto Power** with **Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (Nissan-specific mounts)** upholstered in **Alcantara (Dark Gray/Red stitching)**, paired with a **Nismo S-Tune steering wheel** and **Defi BF Series gauges (oil temp, boost, wideband AFR)** mounted on a **custom A-pillar pod**.
